name: Profile_R5_Account_R4
title: Cross-version Profile for R5.Account resource for use in FHIR R4
description: This cross-version profile allows R5 Account resource content to be represented via FHIR R4 Account resources.

element.short: Cross-version Profile for R5.Account resource for use in FHIR R4
element.definition: This cross-version profile allows R5 Account resource content to be represented via FHIR R4 Account resources.

element.short: R5: Tracks the lifecycle of the account through the billing process (new)
element.comment:
Element `Account.billingStatus` has a context of Account based on following the parent source element upwards and mapping to `Account`.
Element `Account.billingStatus` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.short: R5: The list of diagnoses relevant to this account (new)
element.comment:
Element `Account.diagnosis` has a context of Account based on following the parent source element upwards and mapping to `Account`.
Element `Account.diagnosis` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

Element `Account.procedure` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.short: R5: Other associated accounts related to this account (new)
element.comment:
Element `Account.relatedAccount` has a context of Account based on following the parent source element upwards and mapping to `Account`.
Element `Account.relatedAccount` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.short: R5: The base or default currency (new)
element.comment:
Element `Account.currency` has a context of Account based on following the parent source element upwards and mapping to `Account`.
Element `Account.currency` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

Element `Account.balance` has a context of Account based on following the parent source element upwards and mapping to `Account`.
Element `Account.balance` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.short: R5: Time the balance amount was calculated (new)
element.comment:
Element `Account.calculatedAt` has a context of Account based on following the parent source element upwards and mapping to `Account`.
Element `Account.calculatedAt` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).
The total(s) are not typically updated using the restful API but more often by back-end processes included in a typical finance system.
